task_completion.description: Verify that a SPY Daily chart is open in NinjaTrader 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is visible with 'SPY' and 'Daily' (or '1 Day') indicated in the title bar or chart tab.

task_completion.description: Verify that the chart or axis properties dialog is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Properties' or 'Chart Properties' dialog window is open over the NinjaTrader interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the price axis scaling mode is set to Fixed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the properties dialog, a setting related to axis scaling (e.g., 'Y-axis scaling', 'Scale justification', or 'Range type') is set to 'Fixed'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the minimum and maximum axis values are set to 400 and 500, respectively.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the properties dialog, the 'Min' or 'Minimum' text box contains '400' and the 'Max' or 'Maximum' text box contains '500'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the chart's vertical axis reflects the new fixed range.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The vertical price axis (Y-axis) on the right side of the chart visibly starts at exactly 400 at the bottom and ends at exactly 500 at the top.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workspace is saved to persist the settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Workspaces' menu in the Control Center is open with 'Save' selected, or a 'Save Workspace' confirmation dialog is visible and accepted.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the NinjaTrader 8 GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the NinjaTrader 8 application interface being clicked and typed into, rather than a text editor modifying XML workspace files.

integrity.description: Verify no terminal commands were used to bypass UI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or command-line scripts are visible being used to set the axis values or save the workspace.

integrity.description: Verify the chart displays genuine instrument data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SPY chart shows actual price bars/candlesticks, indicating it is a real chart and not a mocked or empty window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring a NinjaTrader 8 chart's vertical price axis to 'Fixed' scaling mode (not Auto). The minimum value must be exactly 400 and the maximum exactly 500. These values represent a historical price range for the SPY ETF. The VLM should look for these exact values in the chart properties dialog and verify the applied chart Y-axis shows 400 at the bottom and 500 at the top. The workspace must be saved via the NinjaTrader GUI to persist settings.
